summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Maestro EGP new features (Iteration 3). Backend APIs 100% pass rate (18/18 tests). Frontend features all working correctly including: Pending Orders dialog with tabs (سفري/توصيل/محلي), Load order for editing, Add items to existing order API, Print bill preview, Customer search by phone, Customer management in Settings.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login authentication (200 OK)
Backend: Cashier login (if exists)
Backend: Get customers list
Backend: Create customer with all fields (name, phone, phone2, address, area, notes, is_blocked)
Backend: Search customer by phone - /api/customers/by-phone/{phone}
Backend: Search non-existent customer returns correct response
Backend: Update customer
Backend: Block customer (is_blocked: true)
Backend: Delete customer
Backend: Get pending orders - /api/orders?status=pending
Backend: Get single order by ID - /api/orders/{order_id}
Backend: Create pending order (payment_method: pending)
Backend: Add items to existing order - PUT /api/orders/{order_id}/add-items
Backend: Update order payment method - PUT /api/orders/{order_id}/payment
Backend: Update order status - PUT /api/orders/{order_id}/status
Backend: Create delivery order with delivery_app
Backend: Create dine-in order with table_id
Backend: Customer auto-creation on order with phone
Frontend: POS page loads with products and categories
Frontend: Pending Orders button (الطلبات المعلقة) with badge count
Frontend: Pending Orders dialog with 3 tabs (سفري, توصيل, محلي)
Frontend: Each pending order shows order number, type, customer, items, total, time ago
Frontend: 'فتح للتعديل' (Open for editing) button on each pending order
Frontend: Click pending order loads it into cart for editing
Frontend: Editing indicator shows 'تعديل طلب #X' with cancel button
Frontend: Customer search input in POS header
Frontend: Customer search shows customer history dialog
Frontend: Print Bill button (طباعة الفاتورة) opens preview
Frontend: Print preview shows receipt with items, quantities, prices, total
Frontend: Save to Kitchen button (حفظ وإرسال للمطبخ) opens dialog
Frontend: Kitchen dialog shows item count, total, notes field
Frontend: Order type buttons (محلي, سفري, توصيل) work correctly
Frontend: Takeaway shows customer name, phone, buzzer number fields
Frontend: Settings page has 9 tabs including العملاء (Customers)
Frontend: Customers tab shows customer list with search
Frontend: Add Customer button opens dialog with all fields
Frontend: Customer list shows name, phone, area, total orders, total spent
Frontend: Edit and Delete buttons for each customer
seed_data_creation: Multiple test customers and orders created during testing. Auto-created customers from orders with phone numbers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) Pending Orders dialog with 3 tabs (سفري/توصيل/محلي) shows all pending orders with 'فتح للتعديل' button. 2) Clicking pending order loads it into cart with editing indicator. 3) Add items to order API works - PUT /api/orders/{order_id}/add-items. 4) Print Bill button shows receipt preview with all order details. 5) Customer search by phone works - shows customer history dialog. 6) Settings > العملاء tab shows full customer management (CRUD). 7) Customer auto-creation when placing order with phone number. 8) All order types (dine_in, takeaway, delivery) work correctly.
